'''Nul''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zelos II]]. It was the second largest city on the planet after [[Kryndyn]], and was named in honor of [[Mandated Commander of the People of Zelos]] [[Galleros Nul]].

==Sources==
